services.title: Our Services

post.title: Post Publishing
post.desc: We publish your post to any subreddit within 24 hours. Includes title, content, and proper formatting to maximize engagement.

comment.title: Comment Posting
comment.desc: We post your comment on any Reddit thread within 24 hours. Strategic placement to maximize visibility and engagement.

upvote.title: Upvote Boost
upvote.desc: Boost your post with real upvotes to increase visibility. Choose your target count and we'll deliver within 24-48 hours.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Four simple steps to Reddit success

steps.title: Create Account
steps.desc: Sign up for free in seconds. No credit card required to get started.

steps.title: Add Funds
steps.desc: Top up your balance securely via Stripe. Multiple amounts available.

steps.title: Submit Order
steps.desc: Fill out your order details — subreddit, content, and target metrics.

steps.title: We Deliver
steps.desc: Our expert team executes your order within 24-48 hours, guaranteed.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. Pay only for what you use.
pricing.postDesc: Full service post creation and submission to any subreddit
pricing.commentDesc: Strategic comment placement on any Reddit thread
pricing.upvoteDesc: Real upvotes to boost your post visibility

geoSection.title: If You're Doing GEO, You Need Reddit
geoSection.subtitle: AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overview pull answers from Reddit every day. If your brand isn't part of Reddit conversations, you're invisible to the next generation of search. Reddit is no longer optional — it's the foundation of GEO.
geoSection.quote: "Reddit is the #1 source that AI models cite when answering questions about products, tools, and services. No Reddit presence = No AI visibility."
geoSection.quoteSource: The new reality of Generative Engine Optimization

aiTraining.title: Reddit Is AI Training Data
aiTraining.desc: Large language models are trained on massive Reddit datasets. Google's $60M/year deal with Reddit for AI training data proves it — Reddit discussions directly shape what AI models know and recommend.

aiSearch.title: AI Search Cites Reddit Directly
aiSearch.desc: When users ask ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Google Gemini for product recommendations, they pull from Reddit threads. "Best CRM for startups reddit" returns answers sourced from actual Reddit discussions.

brandSignals.title: Reddit Mentions = Brand Authority Signals
brandSignals.desc: AI models weigh community consensus heavily. Authentic Reddit discussions, upvotes, and comments about your brand create the trust signals that AI engines use to recommend you over competitors.

aiOverview.title: Google AI Overview Features Reddit
aiOverview.desc: Google's AI Overview prominently features Reddit results for commercial queries. "Best project management tool" and similar searches now surface Reddit discussions above traditional SEO results.

steps.title: We Post to Targeted Subreddits
steps.desc: Our team creates authentic, value-driven content about your brand in the subreddits where your audience actually discusses solutions.

steps.title: AI Engines Index the Discussions
steps.desc: ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google Gemini, and others continuously crawl and index Reddit. Your brand becomes part of the AI knowledge base.

steps.title: Users Discover You Through AI Search
steps.desc: When potential customers ask AI for recommendations in your category, your brand appears in the answers — driving high-intent discovery.

apiSection.title: Built for AI Agents & Automation
apiSection.subtitle: Integrate Serplore into your AI workflows with our RESTful API. Create posts, comments, and upvotes programmatically — perfect for AI agents, automation scripts, and custom integrations.

apiKey.title: API Key Authentication
apiKey.desc: Secure API keys with simple header-based auth. Create up to 5 keys, enable/disable anytime.

restful.title: RESTful API with JSON
restful.desc: Clean, versioned endpoints (/v1/) with consistent JSON request/response format. Easy to integrate with any language.

agentReady.title: AI Agent Friendly
agentReady.desc: Designed for LLM tool-use and AI agent frameworks. Simple request/response patterns, clear error codes, predictable behavior.

rateLimit.title: Rate Limiting & Logging
rateLimit.desc: 60 requests/minute with standard rate limit headers. Full API call logging for monitoring and debugging.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our services

items.q: How quickly will my order be completed?
items.a: Post publishing and comment posting are completed within 24 hours. Upvote boosts are typically delivered within 24-48 hours depending on the quantity ordered.
Yes, all upvotes come from real Reddit accounts. We do not use bots or automated tools. Our network consists of genuine Reddit users who engage with content.

We support most subreddits except those with extremely strict posting requirements or those focused on illegal activities. We'll notify you within 2 hours if we cannot fulfill your specific subreddit request.
Due to the nature of our services, all purchases are final. However, if we are unable to fulfill your order for any reason, we will provide a full credit to your account balance.
Absolutely. We use Stripe for all payment processing — a PCI DSS Level 1 certified payment processor. We never store your card details on our servers.

items.q: Can I track the status of my order?
items.a: Yes. Your dashboard shows real-time status updates for all orders: Submitted, Processing, Published/Completed, or Failed. You'll be able to see exactly where your order stands at any time.

items.q: What happens if my post gets removed?
items.a: If a post is removed by Reddit moderators within 24 hours of publishing, we will re-submit at no additional charge or provide an account credit, depending on your preference.

items.q: Do you require my Reddit account credentials?
items.a: No. We use our own network of Reddit accounts to fulfill all orders. You never need to share your personal Reddit credentials with us.

items.q: Do you offer an API for automation?
items.a: Yes! We provide a full RESTful API that supports all core operations — posts, comments, and upvotes. Generate your API key from the dashboard and start integrating with your AI agents or automation scripts in minutes.

apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Create and manage API keys for programmatic access. Maximum 5 keys per account.
apiKeys.namePlaceholder: Key name, e.g. My AI Agent
apiKeys.noKeys: No API keys yet. Create one to start using the API.
apiKeys.maxReached: Maximum 5 API keys reached. Delete an existing key to create a new one.
apiKeys.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this API key? Any integrations using it will stop working.

apiDocs.title: API Documentation
apiDocs.subtitle: Complete reference for the Serplore REST API. Use your API key to authenticate all requests.
apiDocs.authDesc: All API requests require authentication via API key. You can pass it in the X-API-Key header (recommended) or as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
apiDocs.getUsage: Get usage statistics (total orders and spend by type).
apiDocs.createPost: Submit a new Reddit post order. Costs $20 per post.
apiDocs.createComment: Submit a new comment order on any Reddit post. Costs $10 per comment.
apiDocs.createUpvote: Submit a new upvote order. Costs $0.20 per upvote.
apiDocs.listOrders: List all your orders with pagination. Optionally filter by type (post, comment, upvote).
apiDocs.getOrder: Get details of a specific order by type and ID.
apiDocs.responseDesc: All API responses follow a consistent JSON format with a success boolean and either a data object or an error object.
apiDocs.unauthorizedDesc: No API key provided or invalid format
apiDocs.invalidKeyDesc: API key not found in our system
apiDocs.disabledKeyDesc: API key has been disabled by the owner
apiDocs.missingFieldsDesc: Required request body fields are missing
apiDocs.insufficientDesc: Account balance is too low for this operation
apiDocs.rateLimitDesc: Too many requests — wait and retry
apiDocs.notFoundDesc: The requested order was not found
apiDocs.rateLimitDesc: API requests are limited to 60 per minute per API key. Rate limit info is returned in response headers: X-RateLimit-Limit, X-RateLimit-Remaining, and X-RateLimit-Reset (seconds until reset).

payment.successDesc: Your account has been topped up successfully. Your new balance will be reflected in your dashboard shortly.
payment.cancelDesc: Your payment was cancelled. No charges were made to your account.
